desc.zh:
北京市郊铁路（Beijing Suburban Railway）是中国北京市境内一种轨道交通运输方式，截至2026年7月，北京市郊铁路运营线路达到4条，市域内运营里程370.0千米，车站26座。
1．S2线
S2线于2008年8月开通运营。2025年10月25日，S2线为配合市郊铁路东北环线建设，黄土店站停止运营，运营区段调整为南口站-延庆站（沙城）。目前，线路全长78.3公里，停靠南口、八达岭、延庆、康庄、沙城（河北区段按照铁路票制票价计费）5座车站，执行周二至周四2对、周五至周一及小长假3对的列车开行方案。
2．城市副中心线
城市副中心线于2017年12月开通运营，先期开通北京西-通州运营区段，2019年6月东延至乔庄东站，2020年6月西延至良乡站，2026年6月西段整体提升完工。目前，线路全长63.7公里，设良乡、房山东、后吕村、衙门口东、北京西、北京、北京东、中仓和乔庄东9座车站。
3. 怀柔-密云线
怀柔-密云线于2017年12月开通运营，先期开通黄土店-怀柔北运营区段,2019年4月北延至古北口站,2019年12月市内始发终到站由黄土店站迁移至清河站，2020年9月北京北站正式开通运营。目前，线路全长144.6公里，设北京北、清河、昌平北、雁栖湖、怀柔北、黑山寺、古北口7座车站，日开行列车8对。
4. 通密线
通密线于2020年6月开通运营。线路南起通州西站，北至密云北站和怀柔北站，线路全长83.4公里，沿线设通州西、顺义、牛栏山、怀柔、密云北和雁栖湖、怀柔北7座车站，日开行列车3对。其中，通州西站至密云北站2对；通州西站至怀柔北站1对。
desc.en:
Beijing Suburban Railway is a type of rail transit within the territory of Beijing, China. As of July 2026, Beijing had 4 suburban railway lines in operation, with 370.0 kilometers of operating mileage within the city and 26 stations.
1. Line S2
Line S2 started operating in August 2008. On October 25, 2025, to support the construction of Beijing Suburban Railway Northeast Ring Line, Huangtudian Station stopped operating, and the operational section was adjusted to Nankou Station - Yanqing Station (Shacheng). Currently, the line is 78.3 kilometers long, with stops at 5 stations: Nankou, Badaling, Yanqing, Kangzhuang, and Shacheng (in the Hebei section, fares are calculated according to railway ticket prices). The train schedule runs 2 pairs from Tuesday to Thursday, and 3 pairs from Friday to Monday and during short holidays.
2. Sub-City Center Line
Sub-City Center Line opened in December 2017. Initially, it operated the section from Beijing West to Tongzhou. In June 2019, it was extended eastward to Qiaozhuang East Station, and in June 2020, it was extended westward to Liangxiang Station. The overall upgrade of the west section was completed in June 2026. Currently, the line is 63.7 kilometers long and has 9 stations: Liangxiang, Fangshan East, Houlvcun, Yamenkou East, Beijing West, Beijing, Beijing East, Zhongcang, and Qiaozhuang East.
 3. Huairou-Miyun Line
Huairou-Miyun Line started operating in December 2017, initially opening the Huangtudian to Huairou North section. In April 2019, it was extended north to Gubeikou Station, and in December 2019, the downtown’s starting-and-ending-station was moved from Huangtudian Station to Qinghe Station. Beijing North Station officially opened for service in September 2020. Currently, the line is 144.6 km long, with 7 stations: Beijing North, Qinghe, Changping North, Yanqihu, Huairou North, Heishansi, and Gubeikou, and there are 8 train pairs running daily.
4. Tongmi Line
Tongmi Line started operations in June 2020. The line runs from Tongzhou West Station in the south to Miyun North Station and Huairou North Station in the north, with a total length of 83.4 kilometers. Along the way, there are seven stations: Tongzhou West, Shunyi, Niulanshan, Huairou, Miyun North, Yanqihu, and Huairou North. There are three train pairs running daily: two pairs from Tongzhou West to Miyun North, and one pair from Tongzhou West to Huairou North.
